steps.title: Compare the march dates
steps.content: The UK march lasted from October 12 to November 16, 1912. The US march lasted from December 16 to December 28, 1912. Therefore, the UK march occurred first.

steps.title: Reject incomplete or reversed order
steps.content: Choice B places both marches in the same broad period without showing sequence. Choice C reverses the order by putting the US march first. Choice D gives only the UK march and omits the comparison.

steps.title: Show first and second
steps.content: The remaining choice explicitly states that the US march happened after the UK march, matching the dates in the notes. The answer is A.
